## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Rapyd and GrowthX to discuss content performance, publishing priorities, and process improvements.](https://fathom.video/share/jw6CXfVzbUR9_N_WzJowyJfvydXq4trD?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Need to increase publishing volume to 5-7 articles/week consistently to improve organic traffic and lead generation](https://fathom.video/share/jw6CXfVzbUR9_N_WzJowyJfvydXq4trD?tab=summary&timestamp=1291.0)
  - [Prioritizing stablecoin and key LATAM country content for upcoming weeks](https://fathom.video/share/jw6CXfVzbUR9_N_WzJowyJfvydXq4trD?tab=summary&timestamp=1556.0)
  - [Implementing process improvements for review workflow and content prioritization in Airtable](https://fathom.video/share/jw6CXfVzbUR9_N_WzJowyJfvydXq4trD?tab=summary&timestamp=1707.0)
  - [Exploring ways to repurpose GrowthX content for social media posts and sales team use](https://fathom.video/share/jw6CXfVzbUR9_N_WzJowyJfvydXq4trD?tab=summary&timestamp=162.0)

## Topics

### Content Performance Update

  - [7 new articles to be delivered this week](https://fathom.video/share/jw6CXfVzbUR9_N_WzJowyJfvydXq4trD?tab=summary&timestamp=649.0)
  - [Published 3 articles last week](https://fathom.video/share/jw6CXfVzbUR9_N_WzJowyJfvydXq4trD?tab=summary&timestamp=649.0)
  - [Slight drop in overall sessions from last week's peak (likely due to Google algorithm update)](https://fathom.video/share/jw6CXfVzbUR9_N_WzJowyJfvydXq4trD?tab=summary&timestamp=678.0)
  - Now ranking \#1 for 405 non-branded keywords
  - [Peak level of LLM referrals, with ChatGPT as top source](https://fathom.video/share/jw6CXfVzbUR9_N_WzJowyJfvydXq4trD?tab=summary&timestamp=699.0)

### Publishing Goals and Priorities

  - [Current average: \~3 articles/week](https://fathom.video/share/jw6CXfVzbUR9_N_WzJowyJfvydXq4trD?tab=summary&timestamp=1429.0)
  - [Target: 5-7 articles/week consistently](https://fathom.video/share/jw6CXfVzbUR9_N_WzJowyJfvydXq4trD?tab=summary&timestamp=1349.0)
  - [Prioritizing stablecoin content to support paid campaign launch](https://fathom.video/share/jw6CXfVzbUR9_N_WzJowyJfvydXq4trD?tab=summary&timestamp=1777.0)
  - [Focus on key LATAM markets: Colombia, Mexico, Argentina, Peru, Chile, Brazil](https://fathom.video/share/jw6CXfVzbUR9_N_WzJowyJfvydXq4trD?tab=summary&timestamp=1916.0)

### Process Improvements

  - [Exploring Airtable automation to notify reviewers via email](https://fathom.video/share/jw6CXfVzbUR9_N_WzJowyJfvydXq4trD?tab=summary&timestamp=1737.0)
  - [Adding prioritization labels/comments in Airtable for clearer focus](https://fathom.video/share/jw6CXfVzbUR9_N_WzJowyJfvydXq4trD?tab=summary&timestamp=1811.0)
  - [Structuring agenda updates with clear action items, owners, and timelines](https://fathom.video/share/jw6CXfVzbUR9_N_WzJowyJfvydXq4trD?tab=summary&timestamp=1973.0)
  - [Investigating ways to streamline content review process for Solutions team](https://fathom.video/share/jw6CXfVzbUR9_N_WzJowyJfvydXq4trD?tab=summary&timestamp=1575.0)

### Social Media Content Strategy

  - [Meeting scheduled to discuss repurposing GrowthX content for social posts](https://fathom.video/share/jw6CXfVzbUR9_N_WzJowyJfvydXq4trD?tab=summary&timestamp=169.0)
  - [Will explore successful cadences (user stories, case studies, social proof)](https://fathom.video/share/jw6CXfVzbUR9_N_WzJowyJfvydXq4trD?tab=summary&timestamp=1642.0)
  - [Aim to align content with Ari's social strategy and Octopost implementation](https://fathom.video/share/jw6CXfVzbUR9_N_WzJowyJfvydXq4trD?tab=summary&timestamp=1174.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Mara to investigate Airtable email notification feature for reviewers](https://fathom.video/share/jw6CXfVzbUR9_N_WzJowyJfvydXq4trD?tab=summary&timestamp=588.0)
  - [Team to focus on prioritized stablecoin and LATAM country content](https://fathom.video/share/jw6CXfVzbUR9_N_WzJowyJfvydXq4trD?tab=summary&timestamp=1795.0)
  - [Mara to create template for competitive intel needed for comparison posts](https://fathom.video/share/jw6CXfVzbUR9_N_WzJowyJfvydXq4trD?tab=summary&timestamp=1575.0)
  - [Mark to add prioritization labels to Airtable for upcoming content focus](https://fathom.video/share/jw6CXfVzbUR9_N_WzJowyJfvydXq4trD?tab=summary&timestamp=1811.0)
  - [Nicolette to reschedule social media strategy meeting with Ari and Mara](https://fathom.video/share/jw6CXfVzbUR9_N_WzJowyJfvydXq4trD?tab=summary&timestamp=2151.0)
  - [Mara to pull data on top-ranking keywords and correlate with content pillars](https://fathom.video/share/jw6CXfVzbUR9_N_WzJowyJfvydXq4trD?tab=summary&timestamp=1007.0)
